summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of Ambar Rojo Studios landing page. Dark Forge aesthetic with crimson accents perfectly implemented. All major features working: hero animations, smooth scrolling, glassmorphism cards, Tetris portfolio grid, animated counters, WhatsApp integration, and responsive design.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu opens but navigation links may not be properly visible/styled in mobile view

passed_tests: Hero section loads with animated geometric shapes and particles
Navigation links scroll smoothly to all sections (Nosotros, Servicios, Proyectos, Contacto)
CTA buttons in hero ('Explorar Proyectos', 'Nuestros Servicios') work and navigate correctly
About section displays correctly with amber story text and branding
Services section shows 3+ glassmorphism cards with hover effects
Portfolio section shows asymmetric Tetris-style grid with 6 projects
Stats section displays 4 animated counters with proper values
Contact section shows WhatsApp CTA button with correct link (wa.me/529611234567)
WhatsApp floating button is visible in bottom-right corner and functional
Footer displays logo, social links (Twitter, Facebook), and copyright text
Custom cursor effect elements present in DOM (glowing red dot)
Grain overlay texture is visible and properly implemented
All images load correctly (about section, portfolio items)
Spanish content properly implemented throughout the site
Dark Forge aesthetic with #C0002A crimson red accents implemented correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Improve mobile navigation menu visibility/styling when opened. Navigation links exist but may not be properly visible in mobile menu dropdown.
